name: Sarah M.
text: Absolutely brilliant service. Nasser was punctual, professional, and my 10-year-old carpets look brand new. The steam cleaning got out stains I thought were permanent. Highly recommend to anyone in Sydney.

name: James K.
text: Rescued our white sofa after a major red wine spill. They were on time, professional, and the price was exactly what they quoted over the phone — no surprises. Will definitely use again.

name: Linda T.
text: Used Your Local Carpet Cleaner for end-of-lease cleaning in Revesby. Got my full bond back with no issues from the real estate agent. Fast, thorough, and great value. Thank you!

name: Michael D.
text: Family-owned feel with big-business professionalism. Cleaned three bedrooms and a living room. Carpets dried within a couple of hours and smell incredible. 100% recommended.

name: Priya R.
text: Had pet odour issues in two rooms for ages. Nasser used an enzyme treatment that completely eliminated the smell — didn't just mask it. Fantastic result. Wish I'd called sooner!

name: Tony G.
text: Used them for commercial carpet cleaning in our Sefton office. Came after hours, minimal disruption, and the carpets look professionally maintained. Very competitive pricing too.
